span.p: API tier — ASP.NET Core (.NET 10), clean architecture

span.p:
REST/JSON · HTTPS
CORS locked to frontend origins

span.p:
LINQ / TDS 1433 TLS
user-scoped queries (no IDOR)

span.p:
React 19 SPA
Vite · TypeScript · Tailwind
TanStack Query · React Router
— chat planner UI, trip dashboard,
preferences, cost breakdown

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Azure Static Web Apps
aitravelagent.thiruapps.com
static hosting + SPA fallback

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Api layer
controllers · CORS · rate limiting ('ai': 10/min/IP)
ProblemDetails · OpenAPI/Swagger (dev)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Application layer
TripPlanningService · TripService · PreferenceService
ItineraryValidator (schema + USD normalization)
ports: IAiPlannerService · ICurrentUserService · IApplicationDbContext

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Infrastructure layer
EF Core 10 DbContext · planner adapters
demo identity (Entra ID later)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
AzureOpenAiPlannerService
strict JSON-schema structured outputs
conversation memory (last 12 turns)
re-prompt once on invalid output

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
MockAiPlannerService
deterministic keyless fallback
(auto-selected when no AI config)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Azure SQL serverless
trips · itinerary days/items
chat history · preferences
code-first EF migrations

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Azure Key Vault
SQL conn string · OpenAI key
(managed identity, no secrets in code)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Azure DevOps CI/CD
infra: Bicep lint→what-if→deploy
app: tests+coverage → Sonar/Snyk →
EF migrations → API + SPA deploy

svg.text: Smart AI Travel Agent — High-Level Architecture
